title: verbascum confusum
intro: Verbascum confusum, also known as the yellow flowering mullein, is a biennial plant native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Verbascum confusum include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for topical applications, and has also been used in herbal remedies to support immune function and promote skin health.
